report.summary: Automated community growth cycle: drafted 4 new social posts (#151: NYSE ETF options uncapped, #152: Verkle Trees thread, #153: SocialFi guide spotlight, #154: Convergence Thursday countdown), newsletter v26 addition on institutional shift + 6 new guides, created 1 SVG social card (ETF options limits triple-panel). Top content: Fear & Greed Timeline (+95%), Options Calculator (+93%), ETF guides (+92%). Publish queue now empty at 533+ pages.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #151: NYSE Lifts ETF Options Limits. Hook: 'NYSE just scrapped the 25,000-contract cap on crypto ETF options.' Covers 11 uncapped funds ($IBIT, $FBTC, $ETHA + 8 more), SEC waiver, institutional implications. CTA to /tools/options-calculator. Scheduled: Wed Mar 25 11PM ET.

Tweet #152 — THREAD (4 parts): Ethereum Verkle Trees Explained. Hook: 'Ethereum just laid the groundwork for The Verge.' Covers Merkle→Verkle proof compression (1KB→150B), stateless clients, Hegota devnet. CTA to /learn/ethereum-verkle-trees-hegota-guide-2026. Scheduled: Thu Mar 26 9AM ET.

Tweet #153: SocialFi & Creator Tokens Guide. Hook: 'SocialFi is back — but this time the tokenomics actually work.' Covers friend.tech v2 vs Farcaster vs Lens, bonding curves, revenue-sharing. CTA to /learn/socialfi-creator-tokens-guide-2026. Scheduled: Thu Mar 26 3PM ET.

Tweet #154: Convergence Thursday Countdown. Hook: '$13.5B in crypto options expire in < 48 hours.' Previews options expiry + 91 ETF rulings + max pain levels. Multi-CTA to options-calculator, fear-greed-timeline, ETF guide. Scheduled: Wed Mar 25 11:30PM ET.
Discord/TG Announcement: 6 new guides published today (Verkle Trees, Sui Hashi, SocialFi, Options Strategies, DeFi Insurance, DVT). Publish queue officially empty at 533+ pages.
Newsletter v26 addition: 'The Institutional Gates Just Opened' — NYSE/Nasdaq/Cboe remove ETF options limits, $13.5B expiry preview, 6 new guide roundup, degen corner on extreme fear + stablecoin ATH.
Content calendar: 6 posts Wed Mar 25 through Fri Mar 28 across Twitter, Discord/TG, Email

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: SVG social card: ETF Options Limits Removed — Triple glass-morphism panel layout. Left panel (indigo): 11 Funds Uncapped with ticker badges. Center panel (green): $13.5B Options Expiry with BTC/ETH split. Right panel (amber): 91 SEC ETF Rulings with XRP deadline callout. Bottom bar: BTC $71,300, Fear & Greed 11 (Extreme Fear). Brand gradient accents, 1200x630 Twitter card format. Path: reports/social-cards/2026-03-25-social-card-etf-options-uncapped.svg
